name: Procedural Void
partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Proposed sub-region of Ω_void specific to learned action. No derivation of how Ω_proc partitions from Ω_void.
definition: The blind operational layer where repeated, validated actions become automatic; Ω_proc ⊂ Ω_void. A motion lives in Ω_proc when it runs without conscious narration.
tier_note: preserve as seed; requires G₂-derivation to promote to canonical

name: Blind Fluency Field
partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Multiplicative composite with free coefficients κ α λ. Narrative not derivation.
definition: The measurable strength of a skill once it has migrated below conscious narration. Defined in EQ-1067.
tier_note: preserve as seed; coefficients need grounding

name: Inspection Load
partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Operational definition only.
definition: How much conscious attention is trying to manually control an already-automated procedural loop. Elevated during choking under pressure.

name: Repetition Depth
partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Distinct from raw rep count; weighted by validation.
definition: Successful validated repetitions (not raw rep count). The unit of procedural migration into Ω_proc.

name: Embodied Echo
partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Mutual-information form is structurally clean; see EQ-1069.
definition: The action-return mutual-information signal that lets humans ""feel"" space people timing pressure correctness. Body-as-sonar.
tier_note: promising candidate for formal derivation from Page-Wootters framework

name: Conscious Jitter
partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Captures Masters 1992 reinvestment phenomenon.
definition: Destabilization induced when conscious inspection tries to override an automated procedural loop. See EQ-1070.

name: Narrator Lag
partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Resonates with Libet readiness-potential literature.
definition: Time gap between the body-loop completing a coherence update and the self-model identifying it as a decision. See EQ-1076.
tier_note: cite against Libet 1983 and Soon et al. 2008

name: Muscle Coherence Lock
partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Fitness-book chapter language.
definition: The degree to which a rep locks in — target tension × somatic clarity × prediction accuracy over joint noise + overinspection + scar. See EQ-1073.

name: Non-Interference Gate
partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Sigmoidal ""let go"" formalization.
definition: Non-interference gate. Closes when inspection dominates Ω_proc; opens when procedural void dominates. See EQ-1074.

name: Human Irreducibility Operator
partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Human taste-stakes-resonance that prevents AI generic-collapse.
definition: The human operator selecting against AI genericity: human taste, stakes, embodied resonance, rejection of flat output.
tier_note: candidate for formal definition via anti-averaging

name: AI Compression Kernel
partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. AI compression / formalization / retrieval / recombination.
definition: AI's ability to compress, formalize, retrieve, and recombine symbolic structure. Counterpart to I_H in the HAT tensor.

name: Human-AI Synchrony
partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Coherence between human intention and AI output.
definition: Coherence between human intention and AI output; operational gain factor in the tensor.

name: Off-Diagonal Insight
partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Currently defined circularly with EQ-1079. Requires non-circular reformulation or reframing as empirical observation before promotion to canonical.
definition: Insight that is neither the human's alone nor the AI's alone — emergent from the tensor. Currently circular with EQ-1079; needs reformulation.
